sizing_rule.note: Risk 1.5% of equity per trade (1-R units). Scale position size up by 15% multiplier when portfolio equity increases by 2.5% or more. Cap max position at 3% of equity. Equalizes risk exposure across portfolio positions.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size proportionally to account equity changes and risk per trade, equalizing risk exposure across all portfolio positions to maintain consistent 1-R risk units.
